message:
fix(engine): collapse nested if/if-let in simulate_single_queue_fifo and update beads tracking

module_cache.rs:
- Refactors a nested `if capacity >= limit { if let Some(evicted) =
  queue.pop_front() { ... } }` into a single `if capacity >= limit &&
  let Some(evicted) = queue.pop_front() { ... }` using Rust 2024
  let-chain syntax. This is the "collapsible-if cleanup" flagged by
  clippy — semantically identical but satisfies the lint and reduces
  nesting depth by one level in simulate_single_queue_fifo().

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Updates bd-1lsy.7.20.1 (S3FIFO baseline comparator) notes with
  detailed rch verification status: library tests (110 passed),
  integration tests (83 passed), clippy (exit 0 after collapsible-if
  fix). Documents that the `run` lane is still blocked by rch
  timeout-policy drift (300s vs requested 1800s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
